scheme_name: Mukhyamantri Mahila Utkarsh Yojana
category: Social welfare & Empowerment, Women and Child
description: Mukhyamantri Mahila Utkarsh Yojana is a scheme launched by the Government of Gujarat to empower women in the state. The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to women entrepreneurs and to promote their entrepreneurial spirit.

scheme_name: Subsidy Scheme On Establishment Of - 25 Kadaknath/R.I.R. Birds Unit To Scheduled Tribes
description: The scheme “Subsidy Scheme on Establishment of - 25 Kadaknath/R.I.R. Birds Unit to Scheduled Tribes” was launched by the Dept. of Agriculture, Farmers Welfare & Co-operation, Govt. of Gujarat to provide employment, nutritious diet and to raise the income of Scheduled Tribe People of Gujarat State.

scheme_name: Scheme For Subsidy On Interest For Establishment Of 1 To 20 Milch Animal Farm
description: The scheme “Scheme for Subsidy on Interest for Establishment of 1 to 20 Milch Animal Farm for the State Cattle Breeders” was started by the Dept. of Agriculture, Farmers Welfare & Co-operation, Government of Gujarat.

scheme_name: Incentive To Owners Of Artificial Insemination Born Female Calf Through Pure Breeding In Indigenous Cow
description: The scheme “Incentive to Owners of Artificial Insemination Born Female Calf through Pure Breeding in Indigenous Cow” was started by the Department of Agriculture, Farmers Welfare & Co-operation, Government of Gujarat.

scheme_name: Go-Green Three Wheelers Scheme (GBOCWWB)
description: Under the scheme, a one-time subsidy will be provided on the purchase of battery-operated tricycle (e-rickshaw) vehicles to registered construction disabled workers. Also, assistance will be available for the amount of Registration Fee and Road Tax paid for the first time of the new Three-Wheeler.

scheme_name: Tablet Assistance to Scheduled Caste Students of 12th Standard
description: Under the scheme, students in the 12th standard belonging to the Scheduled Caste category will receive a tablet by paying a token fee of ₹1,000/-.

scheme_name: Scholarship/Stipend to SC Students for ITI/Professional Courses (Swami Vivekanand Scholarship)
description: Under the scheme, a monthly stipend/scholarship will be given to Scheduled Caste Category students who are studying professional courses in Government or Private Industrial Training Institute (ITI).

scheme_name: Maternity Assistance Scheme- Gujarat Labour Welfare Board
category: Social welfare & Empowerment, Women and Child
description: The scheme provides financial assistance to female workers and the wives of workers to cover expenses incurred for health check-ups, medicine, nutritious diet, etc., during the maternity period.

scheme_name: Full Medical Checkup Assistance Scheme- Gujarat Labour Welfare Board
description: The objective of the scheme is to conduct health check-ups for male Shramyogis above 45 years of age and female Shram Yogis above 35 years of age who are working in the organized sector in the state of Gujarat.

scheme_name: Financial Assistance Scheme for Purchase of Agricultural Land to Scheduled Caste Farmers
category: Banking,Financial Services and Insurance, Social welfare & Empowerment
description: The scheme was launched on in the year 1986. Under the scheme, financial assistance is provided to farmers belonging to the scheduled castes to purchase agricultural land, with a maximum limit of 2 acres, for self-cultivation.

scheme_name: Loan Assistance to Scheduled Castes Students for Commercial Pilot Training
description: The scheme was commenced in the year 1987 with the objective to provide financial assistance to bright Scheduled Castes Students who want to undergo training for commercial pilot license.

scheme_name: Scheme for Small Business Owners of Scheduled Castes to Buy a Place of Business/Shop
category: Banking,Financial Services and Insurance, Business & Entrepreneurship
description: Under the scheme, financial assistance in the form of loans and subsidies is provided by banks to individuals belonging to the Scheduled Castes category. This assistance is aimed at enabling them to purchase business premises or shops in urban areas for business development.

scheme_name: Cattle Shed Subsidy Scheme under Scheduled Castes Sub Plan (SC Category)
description: The scheme “Cattle Shed Subsidy Scheme under Scheduled Castes Sub Plan (SCSP)” is implemented by the Directorate of Animal Husbandry, Government of Gujarat. Under this scheme, the financial assistance is given to Scheduled Caste beneficiaries for construction of Cattle Shed for 2 animals.

scheme_name: Sant Surdas Scheme
description: Under the scheme, monthly financial assistance is provided to Persons with Disabilities aged between 0 and 17 years, who have a disability of more than 80% and are registered in the Below Poverty Line (BPL) list.

scheme_name: Assistance for Power Driven Chaff Cutter Scheme under Integrated Fodder Development Scheme (General Category)
description: The scheme provides financial assistance to dairy farmers belonging to General Caste category on purchase of electric powered chaff cutters. By using power driven chaff cutter, dairy farmers can reduce wastage of green & dry fodder which is economically important for their profitable dairy farming.

scheme_name: Poshan Sudha
description: This scheme is a government initiative to provide nutrition and healthcare support to pregnant and lactating mothers in tribal districts of Gujarat.

scheme_name: Ganga Swarupa Punah Lagna Arthik Sahay Scheme
category: Social welfare & Empowerment, Women and Child
description: The scheme supports remarried women who are beneficiaries of the Ganga Swarupa Pension Scheme, aiming to reintegrate them into society with financial support.

scheme_name: Kisan Parivahan Yojana
description: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat. It aims to provide financial assistance to farmers for purchasing medium-sized goods vehicles to facilitate the transportation of agricultural produce.

scheme_name: Scheme to Provide Financial Assistance to Farmers for Purchasing Sanedo Agricultural Equipment
description: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat. It aims to provide financial assistance to farmers for purchasing Sanedo (Mini Tractor) equipment, which enhances efficiency and reduces labor dependency in farming operations.

scheme_name: Scheme for Assistance on Purchase of Smartphone by the Farmers
description: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Dept., Gujarat. It aims to provide financial assistance to farmers for purchasing smartphones, enabling them to access agricultural technology, weather updates, pest control techniques, and government assistance.

scheme_name: Diesel VAT Relief Scheme for Fishermen
description: The "Diesel VAT Relief Scheme for Fishermen" introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat, aims to provide financial assistance by subsidizing the VAT levied on high-speed diesel used in fishing boats.

scheme_name: Establishment of 1 to 20 Milch Animal Farm
description: The "Establishment of 1 to 20 Milch Animal Farm" scheme introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat, provides financial assistance in the form of an interest subsidy to livestock farmers to take up animal husbandry as a sustainable business.

scheme_name: Intensive Castration Scheme
description: The "Intensive Castration Scheme" introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat, aims to control the stray animal population by castrating male calves and helps in reducing accidents caused by stray male animals in rural and urban areas.

scheme_name: Assistance of Concentrate Feed After Parturition (Scheduled Caste Category)
description: The scheme "Assistance of Concentrate Feed After Parturition (Scheduled Caste Category)" provides 150 kg of BIS Type II concentrate feed to Scheduled Caste Category livestock owners after parturition to support cattle health, increase milk production, and enhance calf development.

scheme_name: Assistance of Concentrate Feed for Pregnant Animals (General Category)
description: This scheme provides free BIS type II concentrate feed to pregnant cattle owned by General Category livestock owners in Gujarat to ensure their good health, boost immunity, prevent metabolic diseases, and enhance milk production.

scheme_name: Scheme for Upgradation of Gaushala/ Panjrapole
description: The "Scheme for Upgradation of Gaushala/ Panjrapole"  aims to promote indigenous cow breeds and make cow rearing economically viable.

scheme_name: Pandit Dindayal Upadhyay Awas Yojana (Developing Caste Welfare) (EBC)
description: The scheme aims to support Economically Weaker Sections (EWS) by offering financial aid up to ₹1,20,000/- for house construction. This scheme also ensures that Economically Weaker Sections receive support in securing shelter.

scheme_name: Sero Positive Illness Scheme
description: The scheme "Sero Positive Illness Scheme" by the Social Justice and Empowerment Department, Government of Gujarat aims to provide educational scholarships to orphaned and destitute children affected by Sero Positive illness.

scheme_name: Kailash Darshan Yatra
description: The scheme provides financial assistance to pilgrims from Gujarat undertaking the Kailash Darshan Yatra. To be eligible, the applicant must be a selected pilgrim from Gujarat and submit proof of yatra completion within 90 days. Applications for this scheme are accepted offline.

scheme_name: Sindhu Darshan Scheme
description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance of ₹15,000/- to pilgrims from Gujarat undertaking the Sindhu Darshan Yatra in Leh-Ladakh, fostering national unity. Intended beneficiaries include native Gujaratis who complete the yatra and apply within 60 days.

scheme_name: State Art Exhibition Competition
description: The scheme "State Art Exhibition Competition" by the Sports, Youth and Cultural Activities Department, Government of Gujarat aims to promote fine arts and recognize artistic talents by providing awards and scholarships to artists, art students, and school children across Gujarat.

scheme_name: Handicraft Mela Participation
description: The scheme enables artisans and handicraft organizations to participate in government-sponsored melas across Gujarat and other states, fostering market access and preserving traditional crafts. Benefits include subsidized stall fees, promotional support, sales opportunities for handmade products.

scheme_name: Mill Gate Price Subsidy Scheme
description: The scheme provides 15% subsidy on yarn purchases from NHDC depots to handloom weavers, cooperatives, and NGOs, along with freight reimbursement (1–8.5%). Intended beneficiaries include weavers below the poverty line.

scheme_name: Mahila Samriddhi Yojana (GTKVN)
description: The scheme aims to empower women entrepreneurs from Thakor & Koli communities by providing access to micro-loans for self-employment. Under this scheme, financial assistance in the form of low-interest loans is provided to eligible beneficiaries to set up small businesses based on their skills.

scheme_name: Retired Sportsperson Pension Scheme
description: The scheme "Retired Sportsperson Pension Scheme" by the Sports, Youth and Cultural Activities Department, Government of Gujarat aims to ensure financial security to retired state-level medal-winning sportspersons aged above 50 years through monthly pension assistance.

scheme_name: Term Loan Scheme (GMFDC)
category: Social welfare & Empowerment, Banking,Financial Services and Insurance
description: The scheme aims to promote self-employment among individuals from the minority communities by providing financial assistance for agriculture and allied activities, small-scale businesses, craftsmanship, transport sector, traditional occupations, and service-based businesses/trades.

scheme_name: Educational Loan Scheme (GMFDC)
description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance for technical and non-technical education that creates employment or job opportunities for beneficiaries. Through this scheme, loans are provided to eligible students from minority communities for studies within India and abroad.

scheme_name: Scheme for Providing Incentives to Coaches of Athletes who have Won Competitions at the National and International Levels
description: The scheme aims to honour coaches who have significantly contributed to the success of athletes in the field of sports. Under this scheme, financial incentives are provided to coaches of athletes who have won competitions at national and international levels.

scheme_name: Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana (PMMSY-Inland): Construction of New Grow-out Pond - Gujarat
description: The scheme aims to enhance fish production and provide employment through inland fisheries. It offers financial support to construct new grow-out ponds for eligible beneficiaries.

scheme_name: Handicraft Rebate Scheme
description: The scheme provides 5–20% rebates on sales of handicraft goods to cooperatives, with higher incentives for women-led groups and during festivals. Applications are submitted online via e-Kutir.

scheme_name: Pre-Matric Scholarship for the Students of Socially and Educationally Backward Class
description: The scheme aims to provide financial aid to promote education. Scholarships are provided to eligible students of Standards 1 to 10.

scheme_name: Scheme for Integrated Development for Horticulture (HRT-2)
description: The scheme "Scheme for Integrated Development for Horticulture (HRT-2)" aims to promote holistic horticultural growth through financial assistance for production, processing, marketing, and infrastructure support to farmers across Gujarat.

scheme_name: Vishesh Katan, Vankari & Vanat Sahay (Spinning & Weaving Assistance Scheme)
description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance in addition to the central government assistance to spinners and weavers. It provides production incentives to Khadi spinners and weavers with category-wise differential assistance rates.

scheme_name: Educational Loan Scheme (GBCDC)
description: The scheme provides financial support to students from socially and educationally backward classes for higher technical and professional education. It offers loans at concessional interest rates for approved graduate and postgraduate courses like engineering, medical, MBA, MCA, and more.

scheme_name: Sharodotsav Pandit Nandan Mehta: Plan for Conducting Classical Music Competition and Ceremony
description: The scheme "Sharodotsav Pandit Nandan Mehta: Plan for Conducting Classical Music Competition and Ceremony" aims to promote classical music and percussion by organizing a state-level competition and award ceremony on the death anniversary of Pt. Nandan Mehta, through the provision of cash prizes.

scheme_name: National Mission on Edible Oil- Oil Palm: Nursery
description: The scheme component "Nursery" launched under the "National Mission on Edible Oil–Oil Palm" scheme aims to increase the production of oil palm in the state and reduce dependence on imports through providing subsidy assistance for setting up nurseries for farmers.

scheme_name: National Mission on Edible Oil–Oil Palm: Planting Materials
description: The scheme component "Planting Materials" launched under the "National Mission on Edible Oil–Oil Palm" scheme aims to increase oil palm production in the state and reduce dependency on imports through financial assistance to farmers for procuring planting materials.

scheme_name: Assistance in Trellise Mandap for Cultivation of Vegetable Crops
description: The scheme "Assistance in Trellise Mandap for Cultivation of Vegetable Crops" aims to promote structured vegetable farming through the provision of financial assistance for constructing kachha/semi-pucca/pucca trellis mandaps to all farmers across the state.

scheme_name: Distribution of Seeds of more productions varieties/ Hybrids varieties Seeds and fertilizer at subsidies etc. to Adivasi farmers in Tribal Area: Water Carrying Pipe Line (TASP & OTASP) Gujarat
description: The scheme aims to improve the agricultural productivity of Scheduled Tribe farmers through subsidized seeds, fertilizers, and equipment. It provides direct support to tribal farmers for enhancing crop production and livelihood.

scheme_name: Distribution of Seeds of more productions varieties/ Hybrids varieties Seeds and fertilizer at subsidies etc. to Adivasi farmers in Tribal Area: Tarpaulin Gujarat
description: The scheme aims to enhance crop production and livelihood. It provides subsidies on seeds, fertilizers, tarpaulins, and other agricultural inputs to Scheduled Tribe farmers.

scheme_name: Distribution of Seeds of more productions varieties/ Hybrids varieties Seeds and fertilizer at subsidies etc. to Adivasi farmers in Tribal Area: Castor cake/Neem cake/ Liquid Fermented Organic Manure / Green manure seed (For mix in the soil) Gujarat
description: The scheme aims to help tribal farmers improve their livelihood by increasing agricultural crop production. Through this scheme, subsidies are provided on high-yield and hybrid seeds, fertilizers, and other agricultural inputs to Scheduled Tribe farmers.

scheme_name: Integrated Horticulture Development Program for Tribal Area Farmers (TASP) HRT-3
description: The scheme "Integrated Horticulture Development Program for Tribal Area Farmers (TASP) HRT-3" by the Agriculture and Co-operation Department, Government of Gujarat, aims to enhance the horticulture sector through financial assistance and subsidies to tribal area farmers across the state.

scheme_name: PMMSY: Three wheeler with Ice Box including e-rickshaws for fish vending - Gujarat
description: The scheme aims to strengthen fish storage infrastructure for hygienic preservation. Through this scheme, beneficiaries receive financial assistance for a three-wheeler with an Ice Box, including e-rickshaws for fish vending.

scheme_name: PMMSY: Support for Acquisition of Deep Sea Fishing Vessels for Traditional Fishermen - Gujarat
description: The scheme aims to strengthen fish storage infrastructure for hygienic preservation. Through this scheme, beneficiaries receive financial assistance for the support for acquisition of deep-sea fishing vessels for traditional fishermen.

scheme_name: PMMSY: Motorcycle with Ice Box - Gujarat
description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance for the purchase of motorcycles with ice boxes. Through this scheme, eligible beneficiaries receive subsidies to enhance their livelihood opportunities.

scheme_name: Vidhya Sadhana Yojana Gujarat
description: Under this scheme, free bicycles are gifted to girl students across Gujarat to reduce school dropouts among scheduled tribe girls after class 8.

scheme_name: Sri Ram Janmabhoomi Shabari Smriti Yatra Sahay Scheme
description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to scheduled tribes and tribal communities for pilgrimage to Sri Ram Janmabhoomi in Ayodhya in memory of Maa Shabari. The scheme offers ₹5,000/- financial assistance per pilgrim to enable darshan of Lord Sri Ram for eligible tribal beneficiaries.

scheme_name: Funeral Assistance Scheme for Unorganized Workers (Except Construction Workers)
description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to heirs of deceased unorganized sector workers for funeral expenses. It offers ₹10,000/- to eligible heirs of e-Shram card holders.

scheme_name: Kunwar Bai Nu Mameru Yojana Gujarat
category: Social welfare & Empowerment, Women and Child
description: The scheme aims to provide financial support to ST families during the marriage of girls, providing ₹12,000 per couple as financial assistance to eligible tribal women across the state.

scheme_name: Higher Education Assistance Scheme
description: The scheme aims to encourage children of workers and reduce financial burden of education through higher educational assistance. It provides ₹20,000/- for Bachelor of Medicine Bachelor of Surgery admission and ₹10,000/- for other graduate courses to merit students.

scheme_name: Scholarship Scheme for Students Studying in Government Colleges
description: Under this scheme, scholarships of ₹3,000, ₹2,000, and ₹1,000 are provided annually to Science, Commerce, and Arts students to promote higher education.

scheme_name: 6% Interest Subsidy on Loans taken through Banks for Study Abroad
category: Education & Learning, Banking,Financial Services and Insurance
description: The scheme aims to reduce financial stress for ST students pursuing foreign education by providing up to ₹1,50,000 subsidy on interest for 3 years.

scheme_name: Divisional Tripartite Competition
description: The scheme aims to promote theatrical arts and drama performances across Gujarat by organizing competitive events at divisional and state levels. Individual performers and theatre organizations receive cash prizes based on their performance rankings in state-level competitions.

scheme_name: Ashramshalas (Grant in Aid)
description: The scheme aims to provide schooling, boarding and lodging to Scheduled Tribe students at a single location, enabling better employment opportunities and competitive equality with other sections of society. The scheme offers residential education with complete support including free education.

scheme_name: To Increase Fish Seed Production and Inland Fisheries Resources in Tribal Areas: Training Kit - Gujarat
description: The scheme aims to provide training and equipment to boost inland fisheries among Scheduled Tribe beneficiaries.

scheme_name: A Program to Provide 90 Percent Assistance in Planting Material of Horticultural Fruit Crops
description: This scheme offers 90% financial assistance to farmers for purchasing planting materials of fruit crops to promote horticulture.

scheme_name: Scheme for the Award of Scholarship for Post Graduate Students of Various Faculties of Junagadh Agricultural University
description: The "Scheme for the Award of Scholarship for Post Graduate Students of Various Faculties of Junagadh Agricultural University" provides monthly scholarships to students pursuing Post Graduate in various faculties at Junagadh Agricultural University.

scheme_name: Assistance for Planting Vegetable Crops for Raw and Ripe Mandap
description: The scheme provides financial assistance to farmers in Gujarat for setting up vegetable trellises (Mandap) for raw, semi-ripe, and ripe vegetables, with varying support for General, SC, and ST farmers.

scheme_name: Passenger Auto Rickshaw Loan Scheme (DAADC)
description: The "Passenger Auto Rickshaw Loan Scheme" introduced by the Social Justice and Empowerment Department offers financial assistance in the form of loans to Scheduled Caste individuals from Antyodaya families to purchase passenger auto rickshaws and enhance their livelihood opportunities.

scheme_name: Loan for Training of Commercial Pilot (GUEEDC)
category: Education & Learning, Banking,Financial Services and Insurance
description: The scheme "Loan for Training of Commercial Pilot (GUEEDC)" by the Social Justice and Empowerment Department, Gujarat, provides financial loan assistance of up to ₹25,00,000/- at 4% simple interest per annum is provided to Unreserved category candidates for pursuing commercial pilot training.

scheme_name: Saraswati Sadhana Yojana to Economically Backward Class Girls studying in Class 9
description: Under this scheme, free bicycle assistance is provided to economically backward class girls studying in Class 9 in government and grant-in-aid schools across Gujarat.

scheme_name: Pandit Dindayal Upadhyay Awas Yojana-Developing Caste Welfare
description: The "Pandit Dindayal Upadhyay Awas Yojana-Developing Caste Welfare" provides financial assistance of up to ₹1,20,000/- to socially and educationally backward classes, economically backward classes, and nomadic exempted castes for constructing houses across Gujarat.

scheme_name: Swayam Saksham Yojana (GBCDC)
category: Business & Entrepreneurship, Banking,Financial Services and Insurance
description: This scheme aims to instill a sense of self-reliance in the youth belonging to backward classes after receiving vocational education/training. Under this scheme, eligible youth are provided loans at a low-interest rate to start self-employment ventures.

scheme_name: Uniform Assistance for Socially and Educationally Backward Class Students Studying Standard 1st to 8th
description: The scheme "Uniform Assistance for Socially and Educationally Backward Class Students Studying Standard 1st to 8th" by the Social Justice and Empowerment Department, Gujarat, aims to promote educational inclusivity among SEBC students by providing financial assistance of ₹900/- for uniforms.

scheme_name: Scholarship for Self Finance Colleges Students of NT/DNT
description: The scheme "Scholarship for Self Finance Colleges Students of NT/DNT" by the Social Justice and Empowerment Department, Government of Gujarat, provides financial assistance to Nomadic and De-notified Tribe students for pursuing higher education in self-financed colleges.

scheme_name: Stipends to Students of Economically Backward Class for Technical and Vocational Courses after SSC
description: The scheme “Stipends to Students of Economically Backward Class for Technical and Vocational Courses after SSC” by the Social Justice and Empowerment Department, Government of Gujarat, supports education for backward class students by providing a monthly stipend for one year.

scheme_name: Micro Finance Scheme for Self Help Groups (GTKVN)
category: Women and Child, Business & Entrepreneurship, Banking,Financial Services and Insurance
description: The scheme aims to economically empower women from Thakor and Koli castes through self-employment opportunities via Self Help Groups (SHGs). Under this scheme, eligible members of SHGs receive a loan up to ₹60,000/- at low interest to start or expand small-scale businesses/enterprises.

scheme_name: Coaching Assistance for Pre-preparation for Competitive Exams of ALL INDIA level like IIM, CEPT, NIFT, NLU and IELTS, TOFEL, GRE for going Foreign
description: The scheme aims to assist SEBC and economically backward students in coaching for premier Indian and international exams, the eligible candidates receive up to ₹20,000/- or the actual fee paid.

scheme_name: Term Loan Scheme (GSKVN)
category: Banking,Financial Services and Insurance, Business & Entrepreneurship, Skills & Employment
description: The scheme aims to uplift scavengers & their dependents by offering term loans of ₹1,00,000/- to ₹15,00,000/- to support them in starting self‐employment ventures in various trades & professions, enabling them to pursue income‐generating activities and lead dignified lives.

scheme_name: Loan for Small Businesses (DAADC)
category: Banking,Financial Services and Insurance, Business & Entrepreneurship
description: The scheme aims to promote self-employment among Scheduled Caste individuals belonging to Antyodaya Anna Yojana families by providing financial assistance for starting small businesses. Under this scheme, eligible beneficiaries are provided a loan of upto ₹1,25,000/- at a concessional interest rate.

scheme_name: Mahila Samruddhi Yojana (DAADC)
category: Banking,Financial Services and Insurance, Business & Entrepreneurship, Women and Child
description: The scheme aims to promote self-employment and financial independence among women from the Antyodaya Samaj, especially from Scheduled Castes. Under this scheme, loan up to ₹50,000/- is provided at a concessional interest rate to eligible women for starting small-scale businesses.

scheme_name: Mamasaheb Phadke Management of Govt Adarsh ​​Residential Schools (SC) Scheme
description: The scheme aims to expand access to quality residential education for scheduled caste students in standards 9 to 12. Through this scheme, eligible SC students receive free boarding, lodging, textbooks, uniforms, meals, and additional support services to enhance academic participation.

scheme_name: Satfera Samuhlagna (DCW) Scheme
description: The scheme aims to encourage community marriages among economically and socially backward classes. Incentives are provided to couples and the organizing institutions.

scheme_name: Financial Loan for Training of Commercial Pilot
category: Banking,Financial Services and Insurance, Skills & Employment
description: The scheme aims to support students from Socially and Educationally Backward Classes (SEBC) in obtaining Commercial Pilot License (CPL) training through financial assistance. Under this scheme, a loan of up to ₹25,00,000 is offered at a concessional interest rate of 4% per annum to the students.....

scheme_name: Loan For Foreign Study (S.E.B.C.)
category: Banking,Financial Services and Insurance, Education & Learning
description: The scheme aims to support higher education abroad for eligible students from the Socially and Educationally Backward Class (SEBC). It provides a maximum Foreign Study Loan of ₹15,00,000/- at an annual interest rate of 4% to SEBC students.

scheme_name: Krushi Mahotsav
description: The Krishi Mahotsav Yojana is an agricultural development scheme launched by the Government of Gujarat in the year 2010. The scheme aims to boost agricultural productivity and increase the income of farmers in the state.

scheme_name: Atal Sneh Yojana
description: Gujarat Chief Minister Shri Vijay Rupani here today announced the Atal ‘Screening of Newborn for Enhancement of Health’ (SNEH) Yojna to be started in the state from the former Prime Minister Atal Behari Vajpayee’s birthday on December 25, 2016.

scheme_name: Sardar Patel Awas Yojana
description: Sardar Patel Awas Yojana (SPAY) is a housing scheme launched by the government of Gujarat in India to provide affordable housing to economically weaker sections (EWS) and low-income groups (LIG) of society.

scheme_name: Mukhyamantri Kisan Sahay Yojana
description: The scheme was launched on September 6, 2019, to provide relief and support to farmers in case of crop damage due to natural calamities and was implemented by the Revenue Department of the Government of Gujarat in collaboration with the Agriculture and Co-operation Department.

scheme_name: Subsidy Scheme For Establishment Of Goat Unit (10+1) For Scheduled Tribe Women
category: Agriculture,Rural & Environment, Business & Entrepreneurship, Women and Child
description: The scheme “Subsidy Scheme for Establishment of Goat Unit (10+1) for Scheduled Tribe Women” was launched by the Department of Agriculture, Farmers Welfare & Co-operation, Government of Gujarat to uplift Economically poor livestock breeders of Gujarat State.

scheme_name: Subsidy Scheme On Establishment Of 40 R.I.R. Birds Unit For Divyang People
description: The scheme “Subsidy Scheme on Establishment of 40 R.I.R. Birds Unit for Divyang People” was launched by the Dept. of Agriculture, Farmers Welfare & Co-operation, Govt. of Gujarat to provide employment, nutritious diet and to raise the income of Divyang People of the society of Gujarat State.

scheme_name: Stipend Scheme For Poultry Farming Training For Weaker Section
description: The scheme “Stipend Scheme for Poultry Farming Training for Weaker Section” was launched by the Department of Agriculture, Farmers Welfare & Co-operation, Government of Gujarat to raise the income of poultry farmers by scientific poultry farming training.

scheme_name: Scheme For Subsidy On Interest For Establishment Of 1 To 20 Milch Animal Farm For Scheduled Caste
description: The scheme “Scheme for Subsidy on Interest for Establishment of 1 to 20 Milch Animal Farm for Scheduled Caste” was started by the Dept. of Agriculture, Farmers Welfare & Co-operation, Government of Gujarat.

scheme_name: Total Health Check-up Scheme (GBOCWWB)
description: This scheme facilitates a complete physical examination of the construction workers, which can diagnose potential illnesses and early treatment can prevent major illnesses. Hence, major illness can be avoided and the construction worker can lead a healthy life.

scheme_name: Hostel Assistance Scheme for Children of Migrant Construction Workers (GBOCWWB)
description: Under the scheme, hostel facilities for free accommodation and meals shall be provided to the children of migrant construction workers in primary school. The aim of the scheme is to provide primary, secondary, and higher education to the children of migrant construction workers.

scheme_name: Shramik Basera Yojana (GBOCWWB)
description: Under the scheme, the accommodation facilities will be provided @ ₹5/- per day to registered construction workers in temporary prefabricated housing with basic amenities that can be dismantled.

scheme_name: Housing Subsidy Scheme (GBOCWWB)
description: The main objective of this scheme is to provide financial assistance to construction workers registered with the Gujarat Building and Other Construction Worker’s Welfare Board to build their own houses.

scheme_name: Award to Scheduled Castes Students Who Secured Top Ranks at State and District Level in Standard X & XII (Sahuji Maharaj Assistance)
description: Under the scheme, Scheduled Castes Category students who have Secured Top Ranks at State and District Levels in Gujarat in Standard X & XII are given cash prizes. Cash prizes are awarded to the first three students who secure the highest ranks in both Standard X and Standard XII across all streams.

scheme_name: Coaching Assistance to Scheduled Castes Students for Preparation of Examination Like IIM, NIFT, NLU, CEPT
description: Under the scheme, financial assistance is provided to Students of the Scheduled Castes category who are preparing for examinations like IIM, NIFT, NLU, and CEPT.

scheme_name: Dr. P. G. Solanki Scheme for Loan/Assistance to Law Graduates of Scheduled Caste
description: The scheme was launched in year 1973. Under this scheme, law graduates belonging to the Scheduled Caste who intend to start independent legal practice will receive financial assistance for the purchase of business premises/shops.

scheme_name: Coaching Assistance Scheme for Preparation of Recruitment Exams for Scheduled Caste Students
description: The scheme provides financial assistance to Students of SC category who are preparing for all State Government and Central Government Recruitment Examinations of Class– 1, 2 & 3 conducted by UPSC/GPSC/State Commission/Bank/LIC/Subordinate Services Selection Board/District Panchayat Selection Board.

scheme_name: Assistance for Power Driven Chaff Cutter Scheme under Scheduled Castes Sub Plan (SC Category)
description: The scheme provides financial assistance to dairy farmers belonging to Scheduled Caste category on purchase of electric powered chaff cutters. By using power driven chaff cutter, dairy farmers can reduce wastage of green &dry fodder which is economically important for their profitable dairy farming.

scheme_name: Kisan Suryoday Yojana (KSY)
description: "Kisan Suryoday Yojana (KSY)" is a Gujarat government initiative launched in 2020-2021 to provide daytime electricity for agricultural activities, utilizing solar and non-conventional energy.

scheme_name: Aatmanirbhar Gujarat Scheme for assistance to MSMEs: Net SGST reimbursement to Micro, Small and Medium Manufacturing Enterprise (MSMEs):
description: The "Aatmanirbhar Gujarat Scheme for assistance to MSMEs" aims to empower the state's dynamic MSME sector, which significantly contributes to employment, GDP, and exports.

scheme_name: Doodh Sanjivani Scheme
description: The scheme aims to enhance the nutritional health of children aged 6 months to 6 years and pregnant and lactating mothers by providing fortified flavored milk in Anganwadi centers across 20 districts in the state.

scheme_name: Wire Fencing Around the Farm for Crop Protection
description: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Dept., Gujarat. It aims to protect farmers' crops from damage caused by wild and stray animals by providing financial assistance for wire fencing around farms.

scheme_name: Assistance to Farmers to Purchase Heavy Farm Equipment (Tractor)
description: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat. It aims to provide financial assistance to farmers for purchasing tractors, promoting farm mechanization and increasing farm power availability.

scheme_name: Coconut Development Scheme
description: The "Coconut Development Scheme" introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat, aims to support farmers by providing quality coconut saplings and financial assistance for coconut cultivation.

scheme_name: Foreign Education Scheme
description: The "Foreign Education Scheme" provides financial assistance for non-reserved category students pursuing higher education abroad after Standard 12.

scheme_name: Incentive to Owners of A.I. Born Female Calf through Pure Breeding in Indigenous Cow Across the State
description: The scheme aims to support livestock owners in maintaining and increasing the population of indigenous cattle breeds like Gir and Kankrej.

scheme_name: Compensation in Animal Death
category: Agriculture,Rural & Environment, Banking,Financial Services and Insurance
description: The "Compensation in Animal Death" scheme introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat, provides financial assistance to animal breeders who suffer livestock losses due to natural disasters, diseases, or poisoning.

scheme_name: Supply of Fodder Minikit
description: The "Supply of Fodder Minikit" scheme introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat, aims to provide improved varieties of fodder seeds to farmers.

scheme_name: Assistance for Cattleshed, Gaman, Water Tank and Bucket
description: The scheme "Assistance for Cattleshed, Gaman, Water Tank and Bucket" introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Dept., Gujarat, aims to support livestock farmers by offering financial assistance for essential infrastructure such as cattle sheds, gaman, water tanks, and buckets.

scheme_name: Subsidy Scheme on Establishment of 25 R.I.R./Kadaknath & 1000 Broiler Bird’s Unit and Stipend for Poultry Farming Training for Scheduled Tribes People of the State
description: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat. It aims to provide financial assistance and training stipends to Scheduled Tribe (ST) individuals in Gujarat for poultry farming.

scheme_name: Assistance of Concentrate Feed After Parturition (Scheduled Tribe Category)
description: The scheme "Assistance of Concentrate Feed After Parturition (Scheduled Tribe Category)" provides 150 kg of BIS Type II concentrate feed to Scheduled Tribe Category livestock owners after parturition to support cattle health, increase milk production, and enhance calf development.

scheme_name: Assistance of Concentrate Feed for Pregnant Animals (Scheduled Caste Category)
description: This scheme provides free BIS type II concentrate feed to pregnant cattle owned by Scheduled Caste Category livestock owners in Gujarat to ensure their good health, boost immunity, prevent metabolic diseases, and enhance milk production.

scheme_name: To Provide Interest Subvention to Animal Husbandry of the State at the Rate of 4% to the Beneficiaries Kisan Credit Card
description: The scheme aims to provide 4% interest subvention to cattle breeders in Gujarat on timely repayment of short-term loans taken through the Kisan Credit Card for animal husbandry activities.

scheme_name: COP-34 Financial Assistance to Farmer for Interest Subvention (Kishan Credit Card Interest Asst.)
description: Under this scheme, financial assistance in the form of interest subvention is provided to farmers who repay their crop loans on time, helping them improve their agricultural productivity and economic well-being.

scheme_name: Mahila Samruddhi Yojana (GSKVN)
description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to female Safai Kamdars and their dependents to start small businesses. Through this scheme, loans for various self-employment ventures are provided to eligible female individuals.

scheme_name: Late Jaswantsinhji Thakor and Late Rasiklal Andhariya Classical Music Scholarship
description: The scheme "Late Jaswantsinhji Thakor and Late Rasiklal Andhariya Classical Music Scholarship" by the Sports, Youth and Cultural Activities Department aims to promote classical music education by providing annual scholarships to eligible Gurus and their disciples across Gujarat.

scheme_name: Small Business (GBCDC)
description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance at a low interest rate to SEBC individuals for small business ventures.

scheme_name: Mahila Samruddhi (Gujarat Backward Caste Development Corporation)
description: The scheme aims to create self-employment for women from the backward classes. Through this scheme, low-interest rate loans are provided to female beneficiaries.

scheme_name: Transportation Scheme (Gujarat Gopalak Vikas Nigam)
description: The scheme aims to provide loans for the purchase of auto rickshaws and loading vehicles. Through this scheme, financial assistance for vehicle purchase is provided to the Rabari and Bharwad castes from the socially and educationally backwards classes.

scheme_name: Khel Pratibha Puraskar
description: The scheme “Khel Pratibha Puraskar” by the Sports, Youth and Cultural Activities Department, Government of Gujarat aims to recognize and encourage sportspersons by providing cash prizes ranging from ₹10,000 to ₹5,00,00,000 to national and international medal winners across the state.

scheme_name: Financial Assistance to Helpless Artists
description: Under this scheme, monthly financial assistance is given to artists and their dependents who are physically disabled, over 60 years old, have a monthly income of less than ₹600, and are unable to sustain themselves due to age or disability.

scheme_name: Artist Honor (Gaurav Award)
description: The scheme aims to recognize and honor artists who have made a lifetime contribution in the field of fine arts, specifically in painting, sculpture, and graphic arts, and have achieved outstanding accomplishments.

scheme_name: Scheme to Provide Stipend to the Persons With Disabilities of the State for Poultry Training
description: The "Scheme to Provide Stipend to the Persons With Disabilities of the State for Poultry Training" aims to promote poultry rearing skills among persons with disabilities through a ₹2,000/- stipend for attending a 7-day training program conducted by the Intensive Poultry Development Unit.

scheme_name: Scholarships and Stipends
description: The scheme "Scholarships and Stipends" by the Sports, Youth and Cultural Activities Department, Government of Gujarat aims to encourage and support national-level athletes by providing scholarships to medal winners and stipends to participants.

scheme_name: Scheme of Awarding Eklavya Award, Sardar Patel Award and Jaidipsinhji Awardj
description: The scheme "Scheme of awarding Eklavya Award, Sardar Patel Award and Jaidipsinhji Award" aims to encourage sporting excellence by providing financial awards to sportspersons for their achievements at the state, national, and international levels.

scheme_name: Taluka Level Personality Development and Yogasan Training Camp for Scheduled Caste
description: The scheme "Taluka Level Personality Development and Yogasan Training Camp for Scheduled Caste" aims to provide personality development and Yogasana training to Scheduled Caste youths through free residential training camps held at the taluka level across the state.

scheme_name: State Mountaineering Reward Scheme
description: The scheme provides awards in the field of mountaineering is in place to enthusiastically engage and inspire the youth of the state towards risky and adventurous activities like summiting, mountaineering and rock climbing and to honour and commend the youth of the state.

scheme_name: Promotion of Organic Farming under State Organic Policy
description: The scheme "Promotion of Organic Farming under State Organic Policy" by the Agriculture and Co-operation Department, Government of Gujarat, aims to promote organic agriculture by providing financial assistance for certification, transportation, and organic inputs to farmers across the state.

scheme_name: Assistance to Farmers for Mini Tractor and Power Tiller in Farm Mechanization Program
description: The scheme “Assistance to Farmers for Mini Tractor and Power Tiller in Farm Mechanization Program”  aims to support mechanization in agriculture through financial aid for the purchase of mini tractors and power tillers to all eligible farmers across the state.

scheme_name: Tool Assistance Scheme for Pottery Artisans
description: The scheme aims to provide essential tools like electric chalk and electric footmill to individual artisans with a 75% subsidy. It benefits pottery workers, particularly those of Prajapati/Kumbhar caste, by offering instrumental assistance and requiring a 25% beneficiary contribution.

scheme_name: Assistance to Scheduled Castes for Fisheries: Training of Scheduled Caste trainees Gujarat
description: The scheme aims to increase fish production and provide employment opportunities to Scheduled Caste (SC) people engaged in inland fisheries activities.

scheme_name: Mukhyamantri Nidan Yojana
description: The scheme aims to provide free quality diagnostic facilities at all government health institutions in Gujarat. It benefits rural population by offering essential laboratory tests, X-ray, sonography services without charge at nearby government healthcare centers.

scheme_name: IELTS & TOEFL Training Assistance
description: The scheme aims to help tribal students pursue higher studies abroad by offering professional IELTS/TOEFL training. It provides ₹3,10,000/- in training assistance and comprehensive guidance.

scheme_name: Vahan Aksmat Sahay Scheme
description: The scheme aims to provide immediate medical assistance and financial support to road traffic accident victims. It offers comprehensive medical treatment packages for various injury types with cashless treatment at empanelled hospitals.

scheme_name: National Mission on Edible Oil–Oil Palm: Maintenance and Input Cost for Intercropping in Oilpalm
description: The scheme component "Maintenance and Input Cost for Intercropping in Oilpalm" launched under the "National Mission on Edible Oil–Oil Palm" scheme aims to increase the production of oil palm and reduce imports by providing financial assistance for maintenance and intercropping.

scheme_name: SAKSHAM - KVK 2.0
description: The scheme aims to equip beneficiaries with skills for employability and entrepreneurship at taluka/village level across Gujarat. It provides skill development training through Short-Term Training and Special Projects for diverse beneficiaries.

scheme_name: PMMSY: Establishment of open Sea cages (100-120)m3 vol. - Gujarat
description: The scheme aims to support the installation of open sea cages of 100–120 cubic meter capacity for fish farming in marine waters. This helps fishermen and entrepreneurs to undertake cage-based aquaculture, thereby increasing fish production, ensuring sustainable marine resource utilization.

scheme_name: PMMSY : Modernization of Cold storage /Ice Plant - Gujarat
description: The scheme aims to strengthen fish storage infrastructure for hygienic preservation. Through this scheme, beneficiaries receive financial assistance for the modernisation of Cold storage /Ice Plant.

scheme_name: PMMSY:  Establishment of Bio-toilets in mechanised fishing vessels - Gujarat
description: The scheme aims to provide sanitation facilities on mechanised fishing vessels. It provides financial assistance depending on category, with once-in-a-lifetime eligibility.

scheme_name: Chief Minister Scholarship Scheme
description: The scheme "Chief Minister Scholarship Scheme" by the Education Department, Government of Gujarat, aims to provide financial assistance to meritorious students for pursuing medical, engineering, diploma, and higher education courses.

scheme_name: Namo Saraswati Vignan Sadhana Yojana
description: The scheme "Namo Saraswati Vignan Sadhana Yojana (8620)" by the Education Department, Government of Gujarat, aims to promote science education by providing financial assistance to students enrolling in the science stream in Class 11th and 12th.

scheme_name: Swami Vivekanand Scholarship for Technical Diploma in Professional Courses
description: The scheme aims to support ST students enrolled in ITIs and recognized training institutes by providing a monthly stipend of ₹400 for a duration of 12 months.

scheme_name: Educational Travel Promotion Scheme
description: The "Educational Travel Promotion Scheme" by the Department of Education, aims to promote personality development, observation skills, and curiosity among students through funding educational tours.

scheme_name: Vidhyadeep Yojana
description: The scheme aims to provide accidental insurance cover to students studying in all Primary, Secondary, and Higher Secondary schools across Gujarat State. It offers financial assistance up to ₹50,000/- in case of accidental death or permanent disability to the student's parent or successor.

scheme_name: S.T. Bus Pass Fee Concession Scheme For Government/ Non Government Primary, Secondary & Higher Secondary and Higher Technical Education Students
description: The scheme aims to provide concession in bus fare fees to the students studying in Primary, Secondary, Higher Secondary, and Higher Secondary Technical Education in Government and Non-Government schools. The scheme is implemented by the Gujarat State Road Transport Corporation (GSRTC).

scheme_name: To Increase Fish Seed Production and Inland Fisheries Resources in Tribal Areas: Fish Cage Culture - Gujarat
description: The scheme aims to increase fish production and provide employment through reservoir-based inland fisheries. It offers financial assistance to Scheduled Tribe fishermen.

scheme_name: To Increase Fish Seed Production and Inland Fisheries Resources in Tribal Areas: Fish Seed Rearing by Women - Gujarat
description: The scheme aims to increase fish production through inland fisheries and provide employment opportunities, particularly to Scheduled Tribe women engaged in fish seed rearing.

scheme_name: Assistance to OBM Boat Owner Fishermen on Purchase of Kerosene/Petrol
description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to fishermen owning small boats with Outboard Motors (OBM) by subsidizing the cost of kerosene or petrol.

scheme_name: Providing Latest Technology to Group of Pottery Artisans (Energy Efficient Kiln)
description: The scheme aims to provide latest technology and equipment to pottery artisans for better productivity, improved quality and reduce health risks. It provides 100% financial assistance for energy-efficient kilns to groups of registered clay artisans and potters in Gujarat state.

scheme_name: Handloom Rebate Scheme
description: The scheme provides 10% special rebate for 120 festival days; Additional 5-15% permanent rebates for regular sales; Enhanced 20% rebates for women-led cooperatives. The scheme aims to enhance market competitiveness for Gujarat's handloom cooperatives and apex societies.

scheme_name: Scheme for Awarding Fellowships for Undergraduate and Postgraduate Students
description: The "Scheme for Awarding Fellowships for Undergraduate and Postgraduate Students" provides financial support in the form of monthly scholarships to students pursuing higher education in various faculties at Anand Agricultural University.

scheme_name: Construction of Water Storage Tanks for Drip Irrigation
description: The scheme provides financial assistance to farmers across Gujarat for constructing water storage tanks to support drip irrigation, with cost-sharing benefits based on farmer category.

scheme_name: Assistance to Farmers in Purchasing Nano Fertilizers Under the Agricultural Assistance Program for Farmers Other than Scheduled Castes and Scheduled Tribes
description: This scheme offers financial assistance to farmers from non-SC/ST categories to support the purchase of Nano Fertilizers, aiming to enhance agricultural productivity and uplift the standard of living of farmers in Gujarat.

scheme_name: Scholarship for Ph.D. Students of Socially and Educationally Backward Classes
description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to Socially and Educationally Backward Classes (SEBC) students pursuing M.Phil. or Ph.D. to encourage higher education and research.

scheme_name: Swayam Saksham Yojana (GTKVN)
category: Banking,Financial Services and Insurance, Business & Entrepreneurship
description: The scheme aims to promote economic self-reliance among professionally educated unemployed youth from Thakor & Koli communities, aged between 18 & 35 years, who hold degrees in fields such as Pharmacy, Software/Hardware, Automobile Engineering, Law, Chartered Accountancy, & others.

scheme_name: Uniform Assistance for Economically Backward Class Students Studying in Class 1st to 8th
description: The scheme "Uniform Assistance for Economically Backward Class Students Studying in Class 1st to 8th" by the Social Justice and Empowerment Department, Gujarat, provides ₹900/- for three pairs of uniforms to students from economically weaker sections in government and aided primary schools.

scheme_name: Saraswati Sadhana Yojana to Socially and Educationally Backward Girls studying in Class 9th
description: Under this scheme, free bicycle assistance is provided to Socially and Educationally Backward class girls studying in Class 9 in government and grant-in-aid schools across Gujarat.

scheme_name: Microcredit Finance Scheme- Self Help Groups (DAADC)
category: Business & Entrepreneurship, Banking,Financial Services and Insurance
description: The scheme aims to promote self-employment for SC individuals. It offers microloans to start small businesses and become economically self-sufficient.

scheme_name: Bankable Scheme
category: Business & Entrepreneurship, Banking,Financial Services and Insurance
description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to scheduled caste persons for self-employment opportunities. Under this scheme, loans are provided for business, industry, or service activities, along with a subsidy of 50% of the loan amount or a maximum of ₹50,000/-.

scheme_name: Loan For Foreign Study (E.B.C.)
category: Banking,Financial Services and Insurance, Education & Learning, Social welfare & Empowerment
description: The scheme aims to support higher education abroad for eligible students from the Educationally Backward Class (EBC). It provides a maximum Foreign Study Loan of ₹15,00,000/- at an annual interest rate of 4% to EBC students.

scheme_name: Bhagwan Budhdh Scholarship
category: Social welfare & Empowerment, Women and Child
description: Bhagavan Buddha Post SSC Scholarship launched by the Ministry of Education, Government of Gujarat. A scheme was introduced with the aim to encourage SC girl students to continue their higher studies after SSC.

scheme_name: AGR 2 (Farm Mechanization) Scheme Of Farmers Other Than SC/ST
description: The scheme “AGR 2 (Farm Mechanization) Scheme of Farmers Other Than SC/ST” was started by the Department of Agriculture, Farmers Welfare & Co-operation, Government of Gujarat.

scheme_name: Subsidy Scheme For Establishment Of Goat Unit (10+1) For Scheduled Caste People
description: The scheme “Subsidy Scheme for Establishment of Goat Unit (10+1) for Scheduled Caste People” was launched by the Dept. of Agriculture, Farmers Welfare & Co-operation, Government of Gujarat to uplift economically poor livestock breeders of Gujarat State.

scheme_name: Stipend Scheme For Scheduled Tribes - Poultry Training Stipend
description: The scheme “Stipend Scheme for Scheduled Tribes - Poultry Training Stipend” was launched by the Department of Agriculture, Farmers Welfare & Co-operation, Government of Gujarat to raise the income of poultry farmers of Schedule Tribes through scientific poultry farming training.

scheme_name: Assistance Scheme for Occupational Diseases (GBOCWWB)
description: The “Assistance Scheme for Occupational Diseases” has been implemented by the Gujarat Building and Other Construction Worker’s Welfare Board (GBOCWWB) to provide financial assistance to registered construction workers for 15 types of occupational diseases and 23 types of serious injuries.

scheme_name: Mukhyamantri Bhagyalaxmi Bond Scheme (GBOCWWB)
category: Social welfare & Empowerment, Women and Child
description: The scheme has been implemented with the objective of "Beti Bachao Beti Padhao" to prevent female foeticide and to meet the education and marriage expenses of the daughter of a construction worker.

scheme_name: Shramyogi Cycle Subsidy Scheme- Gujarat Labour Welfare Board
description: The objective of the scheme is to provide a subsidy for the purchase of a bicycle to laborers working in the organized sector, enabling them to commute between their residence and workplace.

scheme_name: Laptop Purchase Assistance Scheme- Gujarat Labour Welfare Board
description: The objective of the scheme is to encourage the children of laborers who are enrolled in professional or design courses by providing assistance for purchasing laptops, thereby reducing the financial burden of education.

scheme_name: Private Tuition Assistance to Scheduled Caste Students Studying in Standard 11th & 12th (General Stream)
description: Under the scheme, financial assistance is provided to Scheduled Caste (SC) students who are studying in Standard 11th and 12th (General Stream) and have obtained 75% or more marks in the 10th Standard for private coaching fees, as per merit prepared at state level up to 100 students.

scheme_name: Fellowship Scheme for M.Phil & Ph.D for Scheduled Caste Students (Maharaja Sayajirao Gayakvad Scholarship)
description: Under this scheme, Scheduled Caste students pursuing M.Phil and Ph.D. programs at any recognized universities will receive a monthly fellowship.

scheme_name: Dr. P. G. Solanki Scheme for Loan/Assistance to Medical Graduate Doctors of Scheduled Caste
description: The scheme was launched in the year 1976 with the objective to provide loans/assistance to the Scheduled Caste category doctors to start their independent profession.

scheme_name: Prosthetic Aid and Appliances for Person with Disabilities
description: Under this scheme, a Person with Disabilities with 40% or more disability is given relief in his/her disability as well as equipment for self-employment within the limit of ₹20,000/-. The scheme is fully funded by the state government.

scheme_name: Assistance for Power Driven Chaff Cutter Scheme under Tribal Area Sub Plan (TASP- ST Category)
description: The scheme provides financial assistance to dairy farmers belonging to ST category on purchase of electric powered chaff cutters. By using power driven chaff cutter, dairy farmers can reduce wastage of green & dry fodder which is economically important for their profitable dairy farming.

scheme_name: Free Travel in S.T Bus to the Disabled Persons
description: Under this scheme, the benefit of free travel in all types of busses of the Gujarat State Road Transport Corporation is provided to Person with Disabilities in all state routes and also provides the benefit of travel to the last route out of state.

scheme_name: Mukhyamantri Matrushakti Yojana
description: The scheme aims to enhance maternal and child health by providing nutritional support to first-time pregnant women and mothers of young children during the crucial first 1000 days of life.

scheme_name: Food Bill Assistance
description: The "Food Bill Assistance" scheme provides financial support to non-reserved category students pursuing graduate-level medical, dental, technical, and para-medical courses.

scheme_name: Interest Help Scheme For Graduate Doctor-Lawyer-Technical Graduate
description: The "Interest Help Scheme for Graduate Doctor-Lawyer-Technical Graduate" aims to provide financial assistance in the form of interest subsidy on loans to the non-reserved category professionals in Gujarat.

scheme_name: Scheme to Provide Financial Assistance to Purchase Solar Power Unit/Kit for Solar Fencing around the Farm
description: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat. It aims to provide financial assistance to farmers for purchasing solar power units/kits for solar fencing around their farms to protect crops from damage caused by wild and stray animals.

scheme_name: Subsidy Scheme on Establishment of 25 R.I.R. Bird’s unit 40 R.I.R. Bird’s Unit and Stipend for Poultry Farming Training
description: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat. It aims to provide financial assistance and training to economically weaker sections and Divyang individuals in Gujarat for poultry farming.

scheme_name: Providing Navigational Aids and Other Infrastructure Facilities
description: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Dept., Gujarat. It aims to support fishermen by providing financial assistance for purchasing essential fishing equipment, life-saving gear, and infrastructure to enhance safety, efficiency, and fish preservation.

scheme_name: Establishment of 50 Milch Animals Dairy Unit
description: The "Establishment of 50 Milch Animals Dairy Unit" scheme introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat, aims to provide financial aid to livestock owners for setting up dairy farms, ensuring sustainable dairy production.

scheme_name: Use of Advanced Drone Technology (Agriculture Aircraft) in Agriculture Sector
description: The scheme "Use of Advanced Drone Technology (Agriculture Aircraft) in Agriculture Sector" introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Dept., Gujarat, aims to promote the use of advanced drone technology for spraying crop protection chemicals and bio-fertilizers, etc.

scheme_name: Development of Brackish Water Aquaculture
description: The scheme "Development of Brackish Water Aquaculture" introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat, aims to support the development of brackish water aquaculture through financial assistance for infrastructure, equipment, and modern shrimp farming techniques.

scheme_name: Assistance of Concentrate Feed for Pregnant Animals (Scheduled Tribe Category)
description: This scheme provides free BIS type II concentrate feed to pregnant cattle owned by Scheduled Tribe Category livestock owners in Gujarat to ensure their good health, boost immunity, prevent metabolic diseases, and enhance milk production.

scheme_name: Uniform Assistance for Other Backward Classes (Minority) Students Studying in Standard 1st to 8th
description: The scheme "Uniform Assistance for Other Backward Classes (Minority) Students Studying in Standard 1st to 8th" by the Social Justice and Empowerment Department, Gujarat, aims to promote educational inclusivity among minority OBC students by providing financial assistance of ₹900/- for uniforms.

scheme_name: Stipends to Students of NT/DNT Caste for Technical and Vocational Courses after SSC
description: The scheme “Stipends to Students of NT/DNT Caste for Technical and Vocational Courses after SSC” by the Social Justice and Empowerment Department, Government of Gujarat, supports education for NT/DNT Caste students by providing a monthly stipend for one year.

scheme_name: Award of Fellowship to Most Eminent Artist
description: The scheme aims to honor senior eminent artists through the provision of financial assistance in the form of a monthly fellowship of ₹5,000/- for one year to support their continued contribution to the field of plastic arts.

scheme_name: Publication Support Scheme for Fine Arts
description: The scheme "Publication Support Scheme for Fine Arts" by the Sports, Youth and Cultural Activities Department, Government of Gujarat, aims to encourage the publication of fine arts books through financial assistance provided to artists and art institutions.

scheme_name: Ambubhai Purani Award
description: The scheme "Ambubhai Purani Award" by the Sports, Youth and Cultural Activities Department, Gujarat, aims to recognize outstanding contributions in the field of gymnasiums (Akhadas) through the conferment of the Gymnasium Jyotirdhar Ambubhai Purani Award and financial assistance of ₹51,000/-.

scheme_name: Manav Kalyan Yojana
description: The scheme provides toolkit assistance (e-vouchers) to economically weak individuals (annual income ≤ ₹6,00,000/-) for self-employment in 10 trades like dairy, plumbing, and beauty parlors. Beneficiaries include SC/ST, nomadic tribes, and BPL families.

scheme_name: Small Scale Lending Scheme (Microfinance)
category: Social welfare & Empowerment, Banking,Financial Services and Insurance
description: The scheme aims to provide microcredit to the small entrepreneurs of the target group. It provides loans up to ₹1,25,000/- at 5% interest rate to eligible beneficiaries belonging to the Rabari and Bharwad castes.

scheme_name: Pandit Omkarnath Classical Music Festival and Awards
description: The scheme "Pandit Omkarnath Classical Music Festival and Awards" by the Sports, Youth and Cultural Activities Department, Government of Gujarat aims to honor and encourage contributions in classical music through national-level awards and recognition to eminent male classical music artists.

scheme_name: Girnar Arohan-Avrohan Competition
description: The scheme “Girnar Arohan-Avrohan Competition” by the Department of Sports, Youth and Cultural Activities aims to promote physical fitness and competitive spirit among citizens through a state-level stair-climbing competition on Mount Girnar, offering cash prizes to the top 10 winners.

scheme_name: International Financial Assistance
description: The scheme "International Financial Assistance" by the Sports, Youth and Cultural Activities Department, aims to promote participation of Gujarat sportspersons in international competitions through financial support of ₹75,000/- for travel, accommodation, and other related expenses.

scheme_name: Trekking in Coastal Area for Scheduled Caste
description: The scheme "Trekking in Coastal Area for Scheduled Caste" by the Sports, Youth and Cultural Activities Dept., aims to promote cultural awareness and coastal resource understanding by organizing guided trekking tours for Scheduled Caste youths aged 15 to 35 across the coastal region of Sagarkantha.

scheme_name: Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana (PMMSY-Inland): Small Biofloc Establishment Gujarat
description: The scheme aims to increase inland fish production and generate employment through innovative fish farming techniques like Biofloc and RAS.

scheme_name: National Mission for Sustainable Agriculture - Reinforced Area Development
description: The scheme "National Mission for Sustainable Agriculture - Reinforced Area Development" aims to promote sustainable agriculture through improved agronomic practices, efficient resource use, and integrated farming systems by providing financial support to all farmers.

scheme_name: Scheme for Fruit and Vegetable Preservation and Training Program in Horticulture Department HRT 5
description: The "Scheme for Fruit and Vegetable Preservation and Training Program in Horticulture Department HRT 5" aims to enhance the skills of women through training on value addition, preservation, and kitchen gardening of horticultural produce, while also providing a daily stipend and training support.

scheme_name: Assistance for Protected Cultivation
description: The scheme “Assistance for Protected Cultivation” by the Agriculture and Co-operation Department, Government of Gujarat aims to promote protected horticulture practices by providing financial assistance to farmers for mulching, plug nursery, polyhouse, shed net house, and nursery development.

scheme_name: Distribution of Seeds of more productions varieties/ Hybrids varieties Seeds and fertilizer at subsidies etc. to Adivasi farmers in Tribal Area: Agricultural Fair/Exhibition/Farmer Camp Gujarat
description: The scheme aims to improve the agricultural productivity and the livelihood of Adivasi farmers. It provides hybrid seeds, fertilizers, equipment, and support for agricultural fairs.

scheme_name: National Mission on Edible Oil- Oil Palm: Replanting of Old Oil Palm Garden
description: The scheme component "Replanting of Old Oil Palm Garden" launched under the "National Mission on Edible Oil–Oil Palm" scheme aims to enhance oil palm production and lower dependency on imports by supporting farmers in uprooting and replanting old oil palm gardens.

scheme_name: Distribution of Seeds of more productions varieties/ Hybrids varieties Seeds and fertilizer at subsidies etc. to Adivasi farmers in Tribal Area: Pump Set (TASP & OTASP) Gujarat
description: The scheme aims to improve agricultural productivity and livelihood. It provides subsidized pump sets and farm inputs to Scheduled Tribe farmers (except Dang district).

scheme_name: Distribution of Seeds of more productions varieties/ Hybrids varieties Seeds and fertilizer at subsidies etc. to Adivasi farmers in Tribal Area: Power Operated Plant Protection Equipment Gujarat
description: The scheme aims to help farmers belonging to scheduled tribes and tribal cultivators residing outside tribal areas achieve higher production of agricultural crops and improve their livelihood.

scheme_name: National Mission on Edible Oil- Oil Palm: Harvesting Tools
description: The scheme component "Harvesting Tools" launched under the "National Mission on Edible Oil–Oil Palm" scheme aims to increase the production of oil palm and reduce its import by providing subsidies for various harvesting tools to farmers in the state.

scheme_name: Rotavator/Thresher Machine Equipment Assistance Scheme
description: The scheme aims to support BPL Scheduled Tribe farmers in tribal areas by providing financial assistance to purchase rotavators and thresher machines.

scheme_name: Swami Vivekananda Exam Oriented Residential Training
description: The scheme aims to provide exam-oriented residential training for aspiring candidates seeking recruitment in defence and police forces. It offers comprehensive coaching and preparation for Army, Air Force, Navy, Paramilitary and Police recruitment examinations.

scheme_name: PMMSY: Refrigerated vehicles - Gujarat
description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance for the purchase of vehicles. Through this scheme, subsidy benefits are provided to general, women, and SC/ST category beneficiaries.

scheme_name: 6% Interest Subsidy on Loans taken through Banks up to a Limit of Rs.5 Lakh for Self-Employment
description: The scheme aims to promote self-employment among scheduled tribe (ST) individuals by making business loans affordable. Under this scheme, ST beneficiaries availing loans for self-employment are provided a interest subsidy to reduce financial burden and encourage entrepreneurship.

scheme_name: Kutirjyoti Yojana Gujarat
description: The scheme aims to provide free household electricity connections to Scheduled Tribe families in tribal areas.

scheme_name: Pandit Omkarnath Music Competition
description: The scheme aims to honour the memory of Pandit Omkarnath and promote classical music among young artists by organizing competitive platforms for singing, vocal, and percussion performances. Classical music artists in two age categories can participate.

scheme_name: Grant In Aid Hostels
category: Social welfare & Empowerment, Housing & Shelter, Transport & Infrastructure
description: The scheme aims to provide boarding and lodging facilities to tribal students who wish to pursue primary, secondary and higher secondary education. Free lodging and boarding facilities are provided to intended beneficiaries who are students studying in standards 5th to 12th.

scheme_name: Doodh Sanjeevani Yojana
description: The scheme aims to provide fortified, flavored, double toned pasteurized milk to students, pregnant women and lactating women. The scheme is implemented by the Anganwadi Centers and also by the Child Development Project Officers.

scheme_name: Manav Garima Yojana DCW (Minority)
description: The scheme aims to enable minority persons to become self-employed through business toolkits and support. Under this scheme, business tool-kits are provided to eligible persons from such groups, so they can set up small businesses.

scheme_name: To Increase Fish Seed Production and Inland Fisheries Resources in Tribal Areas: Training of Tribal Trainees - Gujarat
description: The scheme aims to boost fish production and provide employment through inland fisheries. Under this scheme, Financial assistance is provided as a scholarship to tribal trainees undergoing fisheries training.

scheme_name: Fellowship for the Post-Graduate Students in Various Faculties Various Faculties of Sardarkrushinagar Dantiwada Agricultural University
description: The scheme "Fellowship for the Post-Graduate Students in Various Faculties Various Faculties of Sardarkrushinagar Dantiwada Agricultural University" provides a monthly fellowship to meritorious Post-Graduate students across various faculties of Sardarkrushinagar Dantiwada Agricultural University.

scheme_name: Assistance in Packing Materials under Post Harvest Management of Horticultural Produce
description: The scheme provides financial assistance to farmers to procure packing materials like corrugated and wooden boxes for post-harvest management of horticultural produce.

scheme_name: Assistance Program for the Cultivation of Lotus Fruit (Dragon Fruit)
description: The scheme provides financial assistance to farmers to support the cultivation of dragon fruit (lotus fruit), with higher benefits for SC/ST and priority for small-scale and women farmers.

scheme_name: Assistance Program for Planting in Floriculture
description: The scheme offers financial assistance to farmers in Gujarat for the cultivation of floriculture crops, including loose, cut, and tuberous flowers, based on crop type and farmer category.

scheme_name: Vehicle Loan Scheme (GTKVN)
category: Transport & Infrastructure, Banking,Financial Services and Insurance, Skills & Employment
description: The scheme aims to promote self-employment among youth from the Thakor and Koli communities by providing loans of up to ₹4,00,000/- for the purchase of commercial vehicles such as auto-rickshaws, loading rickshaws, or a Maruti Eeco van to start an income-generating transport business.

scheme_name: Pre-Matric Scholarship for the Students of Minority Castes
description: The scheme aims to support education among minority students by providing financial assistance from class 1st to 10th in government and aided schools.

scheme_name: Term Loan Scheme (GTKVN)
category: Banking,Financial Services and Insurance, Business & Entrepreneurship
description: The scheme aims to promote self-employment among individuals from the Thakor and Koli communities by providing financial assistance up to ₹10,00,000/- for agriculture and allied activities, small-scale businesses, craftsmanship, traditional occupations, and service-based businesses/trades.

scheme_name: Assistance for Purchasing Study Materials for Medical and Engineering Students from Socially and Educationally Backward Classes
description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to students from socially and educationally backward classes pursuing medical and engineering diploma or degree courses to support their education. Under this scheme, eligible students are provided a one-time grant for purchasing study materials.

scheme_name: Post SSC Scholarship for Boys/Girls from Socially and Educationally Backward Classes
description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to students from Socially & Educationally Backward Classes and Nomadic & De-notified Tribes pursuing education after SSC. Under this scheme, eligible students receive yearly scholarships ranging from ₹1,500 to ₹5,000, depending on their academic group.

scheme_name: Various Awards to Individuals/Organizations who have made Outstanding Contributions in the Field of Social Welfare
description: The scheme aims to recognize and honor the exceptional work carried out by individuals and organizations in the field of social welfare, particularly benefiting the Scheduled Caste (SC) community. Under this scheme, awards along with financial assistance are provided as a mark of appreciation.

scheme_name: Uniform Assistance To SC Students
description: The Government of Gujarat launched a financial Assistance scheme for the student who comes under the scheduled caste.

scheme_name: Shri Vajpayee Bankable Yojana
description: A scheme for providing financial assistance to the craftsmen of Cottage Industries through Nationalised Banks, Cooperative banks, Public sector Banks or Private Banks.

scheme_name: AGR 3 (Farm Mechanization) Scheme For ST Farmers
description: The scheme “AGR 3 (Farm Mechanization) Scheme for ST Farmers” was started by the Department of Agriculture, Farmers Welfare & Co-operation, Government of Gujarat.

scheme_name: AGR-50 Scheme-Assistance To Purchase Tractors
description: The scheme “AGR-50 Scheme-Assistance to Purchase Tractors” was started by the Department of Agriculture, Farmers Welfare & Co-operation, Government of Gujarat in the year 2011-12. The scheme was implemented for the farmers to help in buying the tractor in the state.

scheme_name: Stipend Scheme For Poultry Farming Training For Schedule Caste
description: The scheme “Stipend Scheme for Poultry Farming Training for Schedule Caste” was launched by the Department of Agriculture, Farmers Welfare & Co-operation, Government of Gujarat to raise the income of poultry farmers of Scheduled Caste by scientific poultry farming training.

scheme_name: Stipend Scheme For Poultry Farming Training For Divyang People
description: The scheme “Stipend Scheme for Poultry Farming Training for Divyang People” was launched by the Department of Agriculture, Farmers Welfare & Co-operation, Government of Gujarat to raise the income of Divyang poultry farmers through scientific poultry farming training.

scheme_name: AGR 4 (Farm Mechanization) Scheme For SC Farmers
description: The scheme “AGR 4 (Farm Mechanization) Scheme for SC Farmers” was started by the Department of Agriculture, Farmers Welfare & Co-operation, Government of Gujarat.

scheme_name: Scheme For Subsidy On Interest For Establishment Of 1 To 20 Milch Animal Farm For Scheduled Tribe
description: The scheme “Scheme for Subsidy on Interest for Establishment of 1 to 20 Milch Animal Farm for Scheduled Tribe” was started by the Dept. of Agriculture, Farmers Welfare & Co-operation, Govt. of Gujarat.

scheme_name: Subsidy Scheme On Establishment Of 25 R.I.R. Birds' Unit For Weaker Section
description: The scheme “Subsidy Scheme on Establishment of 25 R.I.R. Birds' Unit for Weaker Section” was launched by the Department of Agriculture, Farmers Welfare & Co-operation, Government of Gujarat to provide employment, nutritious diet and to raise the income of weaker section people of the society.

scheme_name: Coaching Assistance Scheme For Scheduled Caste Students For Pre-Exam Preparation Like NEET, JEE, GUJCET
